mapper.select: select id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, nickname, avatar_url as avatarUrl from app_user where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, nickname, avatar_url as avatarUrl from app_user where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into app_user ( username, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url ) values ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl} )
